# War of the Sphinx

> An independent Afrofuturist superhero comic book platform.

War of the Sphinx is a 7-volume independent comic book series set in Neo-Nubia — a near-future African nation on the edge of collapse. Ancient power. Modern corruption. A war that was never supposed to happen.

This platform serves as the digital gateway to the series: lore, artwork, an AI-driven narrative guide called The Griot, and a mailing list for launch updates. Volume 1 is currently in production.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://warofthesphinx.com/) — Series overview, featured content, email signup
- [The Griot](https://warofthesphinx.com/chat) — AI character interaction with an in-universe narrator
- [The World](https://warofthesphinx.com/lore) — Lore fragments and worldbuilding content
- [Gallery](https://warofthesphinx.com/gallery) — Concept art, character designs, and environment artwork
- [About](https://warofthesphinx.com/about) — 7-volume series overview, development timeline, production status
- [Privacy](https://warofthesphinx.com/privacy) — Privacy policy
- [Terms](https://warofthesphinx.com/terms) — Terms of service

## About the Project

- Genre: Afrofuturist superhero science fiction
- Format: 7-volume comic book series
- Setting: Neo-Nubia (fictional near-future African nation)
- Status: Volume 1 in production
- Platform: React, Firebase, Express

## Contact

Email: seekers@warofthesphinx.com
